nodes.name: ETH-GINE.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures an ETH hetero-node classification experiment for the GINE architecture with baseline settings. It sets dataset paths, training and validation cadence, model/GNN or GT parameters, optimizer settings, and Weights & Biases logging.
nodes.languageNotes: YAML sections follow the standard FraudGT experiment layout: dataset, train, validation, model, gnn, and optimizer.

nodes.name: ETH-GINE+Ego.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures an ETH hetero-node classification experiment for the GINE architecture with ego-network features. It sets dataset paths, training and validation cadence, model/GNN or GT parameters, optimizer settings, and Weights & Biases logging.
nodes.languageNotes: YAML sections follow the standard FraudGT experiment layout: dataset, train, validation, model, gnn, and optimizer.
